ip-auth-001.description: IAuthService interface and auth types (AuthResult, AuthSession, etc.)
ip-auth-001.rationale: Service interface pattern from analysis findings. Defines contract for auth operations.

ip-auth-003.rationale: Follows NullPersistence pattern - in-memory implementation for unit tests

ip-auth-004.description: Auth domain store with ArkType scope and enhancement hooks
ip-auth-004.rationale: Domain store pattern - AuthDomain scope + createAuthStore factory with enhanceModels (isAuthenticated), enhanceRootStore (initializeAuth, syncAuthState)

ip-auth-005.rationale: Re-exports types, services, and domain store for clean imports

ip-auth-006.description: Extend IEnvironment with optional auth service
ip-auth-006.rationale: Add services.auth?: IAuthService to enable DI pattern

ip-auth-007.description: AuthProvider React context with Supabase client and auth store
ip-auth-007.rationale: React context pattern from WavesmithStoreContext - useRef for stable instances

ip-auth-008.description: useAuth hook exposing auth operations and state
ip-auth-008.rationale: Custom hook pattern - returns { user, isAuthenticated, loading, error, signIn, signUp, signOut }

ip-auth-009.description: Login form component with email/password inputs
ip-auth-009.rationale: UI component using useAuth hook for sign in flow

ip-auth-010.description: Signup form component with email/password inputs
ip-auth-010.rationale: UI component using useAuth hook for sign up flow

ip-auth-011.description: Route wrapper that redirects unauthenticated users
ip-auth-011.rationale: Gap from analysis - no route protection exists currently

ip-auth-012.description: Environment variable template for Supabase credentials
ip-auth-012.rationale: Risk from analysis - SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY required
